congruent_match: Which labeled polygon is congruent to the Reference?
Identify the labeled polygon that is congruent to the Reference.
Which labeled polygon has the same shape and size as the Reference?
Among the labeled polygons, which one is congruent to the Reference?
Which labeled polygon matches the Reference exactly in shape and size?
similar_match: Which labeled polygon is similar to the Reference?
Identify the labeled polygon that is similar to the Reference.
Which labeled polygon has the same shape as the Reference, possibly at a different size?
Among the labeled polygons, which one is similar to the Reference?
Which labeled polygon matches the Reference in shape, even if the size changes?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description: a Reference polygon and labeled candidate polygons on a grid
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with keys "answer" and "annotation".
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with key "answer".
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_template: set "annotation" to an array of exactly {vertex_count} pixel points [x,y] for the winning polygon vertices
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint: set "answer" to the single-letter label of the correct polygon
